doc_title_en: (Correction) Notice of Partial Correction to "Notice Regarding Cancellation of Treasury Stock"
doc_title_jp: （訂正）「自己株式の消却に関するお知らせ」の一部訂正について
summary_en: 2,360,000 shares to be cancelled (1.77% of shares outstanding, corrected from 1.74%). Effective date not disclosed in correction notice.
summary_jp: 消却株式総数 2,360,000株（発行済株式総数に対する割合 1.77％に訂正、従前は1.74％）。効力発生日は訂正通知では開示なし。

doc_title_en: Notice regarding cancellation of treasury shares (cancellation of treasury shares pursuant to Article 178 of the Companies Act)
summary_en: 2,360,000 ordinary shares to be cancelled effective 2026-05-26. Represents 1.74% of issued share capital (ex-treasury). Post-cancellation issued shares: 137,940,000; treasury shares: 4,321,308 (3.13% of post-cancellation total).
summary_jp: 普通株式2,360,000株を2026年5月26日に消却。発行済株式総数比1.74%。消却後発行株式総数137,940,000株、自己株式4,321,308株（消却後発行済株式総数比3.13%）。
tag_en: Share cancellation – 2,360,000 shares (1.74% of issued S/O ex-treasury) – effective 2026-05-26
tag_jp: 自己株式消却 – 2,360,000株（発行済株式総数比1.74%）– 2026年5月26日効力発生
